'''Thrynni Vae''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprenticed to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Tresina Lobi]]. With Tresina she oversaw the freight transport on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. They discovered that [[CorDuro Shipping]] held back relief goods from [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees|SELCORE]] at the [[Space station/Legends|orbital city]] [[Urrdorf City]]. Thrynni disappeared mysteriously and Tresina went back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where she informed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] about Thrynnis' disappearance. When Skywalker investigated, he questioned a CorDuro guard and had a brief vision of Thrynni murdered and thrown out an airlock.
